highlights: Designed engineering prototypes using Fusion 360 & AutoCAD for robotics.
Performed circuit debugging and material usage optimization.

projects.title: Obstacle Avoiding Sensor Car
projects.description: Arduino-based autonomous vehicle built with ultrasonic sensors and an L298N motor driver for real-time logic navigation execution.

projects.title: PLC Water Level Control
projects.description: Automated logic tracking water level variables via integrated sensors, using structured ladder logic blocks to control pump operation safely.

projects.title: Dual-Tank Automated Drainage Control
projects.description: Sequential tank filling and drainage management automation implemented through structured industrial PLC logic controllers.

projects.title: Face Recognition Attendance System
projects.description: Full-stack biometric attendance tracking app designed for club member tracking with administrative security dashboard tools.

engineering_designs.title: Parametric 3D Model Gallery
engineering_designs.description: Robust component layouts and multi-component assembly models constructed via detailed geometric constraints inside Fusion 360 & Autodesk Inventor.

engineering_designs.title: Structural & Thermal Simulation
engineering_designs.description: Validation models demonstrating structural stress distributions, meshing constraints, and loading evaluation criteria using ANSYS Student Version.

engineering_designs.title: Robotics Prototype Chassis Layout
engineering_designs.description: Optimized mechanical framework layout drafted completely in AutoCAD for laser cutting fabrication production runs.

certificates.title: PLC Automation and SCADA Systems Certificate
certificates.description: Comprehensive certification covering PLC Ladder Logic programming, HMI interface configuration, and SCADA monitoring architectures.

certificates.title: Autodesk Fusion 360 Design Certificate
certificates.description: Validated expertise in design drafting, complex 3D assembly generation, mechanical simulation workspaces, and parametric features layout.
